annotations.title: Not man but God.
annotations.text: <mn>◦</mn> He that despiseth the Church's or her lawful Pastors' precepts, offendeth no less than if he contemned God's express commandments. For they be of the Holy Ghost, and are not to be counted among the commandments of men only.

annotations.title: Sleep.
annotations.text: Some Heretics perversely inferred of this that the souls did sleep till the day of judgement: where it is meant of the bodies only.
